description:
when displaying an aim as a sub aim (indented) in list view, 
show only parents other than the visually apparent parent aim. 
Only if there are others, show them, and replace "supports:" with "also supports:"

status.comment: Implemented visual distinction for additional parents. When a subaim is displayed, it now shows 'Also supports:' and lists only the other parents that are not the currently visually apparent parent in the list view.
